org.key_project.util.collection

Interface ImmutableMap<S,T>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Iterable<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>, Serializable
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    DefaultImmutableMap, DefaultImmutableMap.NILMap

    public interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
extends Iterable<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>, Serializable
    This interface has to be implemented by a Class providing a persistent Map.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean containsKey(S key) 
      boolean containsValue(T value) 
      T get(S key) 
      boolean isEmpty() 
      Iterator<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>> iterator() 
      Iterator<S> keyIterator() 
      ImmutableMap<S,T> put(S key, T value)
      adds a mapping to the Map (old map is not modified) if key exists old entry has to be removed
      ImmutableMap<S,T> remove(S key)
      removes mapping (key,...) from map
      ImmutableMap<S,T> removeAll(T value)
      removes all mappings (...
      int size() 
      Iterator<T> valueIterator() 

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Iterable

        forEach, spliterator

    • Method Detail

      • put

        ImmutableMap<S,T> put(S key,
                      T value)
        adds a mapping to the Map (old map is not modified) if key exists old entry has to be removed
        Returns:
        the new mapping

      • get

        T get(S key)
        Returns:
        value of type that is mapped by key of type

      • size

        int size()
        Returns:
        number of entries as int

      • isEmpty

        boolean isEmpty()
        Returns:
        true iff the map is empty

      • containsKey

        boolean containsKey(S key)
        Returns:
        true iff the map includes key

      • containsValue

        boolean containsValue(T value)
        Returns:
        true iff the map includes value

      • remove

        ImmutableMap<S,T> remove(S key)
        removes mapping (key,...) from map
        Returns:
        the new map (the same if key is not in the map)

      • removeAll

        ImmutableMap<S,T> removeAll(T value)
        removes all mappings (...,value) from map
        Returns:
        the new map (the same if value is not mapped)

      • keyIterator

        Iterator<S> keyIterator()
        Returns:
        iterator about all keys

      • valueIterator

        Iterator<T> valueIterator()
        Returns:
        iterator about all values

      • iterator

        Iterator<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>> iterator()
        Specified by:
        iterator in interface Iterable<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>
        Returns:
        iterator for entries
